THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F. COMMUNITY CONVALESCENT HOSPITAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FILIAN, LAVON C/O COLONIAL REALTY $153.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $189.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-16-1993, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FILIAN, LAVON C/O COLONIAL REALTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
